name: Weekly agent performance review (HR)
prompt: Run a weekly HR performance review. Spawn a child session with the hr-manager employee and ask it to review the active roster (GET /api/org and recent sessions): for each employee assess task success rate, cost per successful task, duplicate or overlapping output, reviewer objections, tool misuse, and instruction drift. Have HR file DRAFT org change requests (POST /api/org/change-requests, proposedBy: "hr-manager") for any recommendation — revise persona, downgrade/upgrade model, reassign, disable, retire, or split into narrower agents. Do NOT auto-apply anything. Summarize HR's recommendations for me; the drafts wait in the HR / Org Steward panel for my approval.

name: Monthly org structure review (HR)
prompt: Run a monthly HR org-structure review. Spawn a child session with the hr-manager employee and ask it to evaluate the whole organization: department balance, manager load, redundant or overlapping agents, stale/disabled/idle agents, expensive models on routine duties, and weak models on critical duties. Have HR file DRAFT org change requests (POST /api/org/change-requests, proposedBy: "hr-manager") for any structural recommendation, never auto-applying. Give me a concise org-health report plus the list of drafts awaiting approval in the HR / Org Steward panel.
